Author: Noranda
Name: XIV Shinies Sync
Punchline: Sync your in-game collection progress to XIV Shinies automatically.
Description: Reads completed quests, achievements, mounts, minions, and relic-stage item possession directly from the game client and uploads them to your XIV Shinies account, so you stop hand-marking. Fully opt-in and per-category. Open the settings with /shinies.
